subject: Presenter View on wrong monitor in PowerPoint
description: Slide show starts with notes on projector and full slide on laptop; user wants opposite.

ts_steps.title: Swap in Slide Show
ts_steps.action: Slide Show → Setup → Display — choose monitor for slideshow vs presenter view manually.

ts_steps.title: Windows display order
ts_steps.action: Settings → System → Display — reorder monitors; identify number matching PowerPoint picker.

ts_steps.title: Use Presenter View toggle
ts_steps.action: Alt+F5 for presenter on single screen test; 'Use Presenter View' checkbox in Slide Show tab.

internal_information: Windows primary monitor vs PowerPoint assignment. Docking station remembers wrong EDID order sometimes.
